DFCommonRules.WildExplain1: Wild symbol substitutes for all non-double symbols except Scatter symbol and Double Wild symbol.
DFCommonRules.WildExplain2: Double Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol and Wild symbol.
DFCommonRules.WildExplain3: Scatter symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.
DFCommonRules.WildExplain4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
DFCommonRules.DoubleSymbolDesc: Whenever a payline win involves one or more double symbol(s), the double symbol(s) will count as two symbols when calculating wins for the current spin.
DFCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere on reels 2, 3 and 4 will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins.
DFCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc2: During the Free Spins Feature, there will be two sets of 5 x 3 reels on top and bottom of the screen which will spin at the same time.
DFCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc3: If both top and bottom sets of 5 x 3 reels have at least one payline win respectively, all wins for that free spin will be multiplied by x8.
DFCommonRules.BonusFeatureDesc4: 1 free spin is awarded for each Scatter symbol appearing on reels.

DFGameRules.DFDesc1: Double Fortune is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring double symbols and Free Spins Feature with two sets of 5 x 3 reels.

DFDesc2.value: The game is played with 30 bet lines (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
DFDesc2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations
DFDesc2.example: The game is played with 30 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 1.

DFMaximumWin.Title: Maximum Win
DFMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination1: The maximum win amount is %{100000}x of the bet amount.
DFMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination2: If the total win in the Free Spins Feature reaches %{100000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
